purpose: Ensure DTO contracts and projection contracts are actually used downstream; block ornamental DTO declarations and local DTO shaping.
rules: No DTO contract may be ornamental.
Every declared DTO contract used by an execution path must be consumed downstream.
Every declared projection contract must be referenced by resolver projection evidence.
Matching shape without DTO lineage is blocked.
Local DTO stitching in generated facade, worker body, adapter body, receipt body, or semantic graph is blocked.
Receipts must include dtoContractKey, projectionContractKey, projectionSource, projectedOutputShapeHash, resolverLanguage, and unsupportedProjectionReason.
completionPosture: The execution path passes only when declared DTO/projection contracts are trace-used downstream and no local equivalent shaping exists.
